channel.title: Capitalist ME: Global News, Business, Politics, Finance and Sports
channel.description: Capitalist ME offers global news, in-depth coverage on business, politics, finance, culture, sports, and the latest world events. Stay informed on key issues

image.title: Capitalist ME: Global News, Business, Politics, Finance and Sports

item.title: UK Economy Accelerates Again in May 2026 as Services Sector Boosts GDP Growth
item.description:
The UK economy returned to growth in May 2026, with GDP rising 0.1% as the services sector helped drive recovery despite continued weakness in manufacturing and construction.

Key points:
• UK GDP increased 0.1% in May 2026 after a decline in April, supported by services growth.
• Services output climbed 0.3%, led by technology, scientific research and professional industries.
• Manufacturing output fell 0.5% and construction activity declined 0.8% during the month.
• The economy expanded 0.7% over the three months to May, showing continued resilience.

Read the full article: UK Economy Accelerates Again in May 2026 as Services Sector Boosts GDP Growth
